title: German Beef Roast with Mellow Gravy
description: A hearty, comforting dish featuring a tender beef roast smothered in a rich, mellow gravy, inspired by traditional German cuisine.

ingredients.name: mellow
ingredients.notes: mellow mustard can be used as a substitute

instructions: Season the beef roast with salt, pepper, and german seasoning blend.
Heat a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Sear the beef roast until browned on all sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove the beef from the pot and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the beef broth, red wine (if using), and chopped carrots and potatoes to the pot.
Return the beef roast to the pot and bring to a boil.
Cover the pot and transfer to the preheated oven.
Roast the beef for 2-3 hours, or until tender and falling apart.
Remove the pot from the oven and let rest for 10-15 minutes.
Strain the juices and discard the solids.
Skim off any excess fat and whisk in the mellow mustard.
Serve the beef roast with the mellow gravy spooned over the top.
